use_cases: FAQ sections for product documentation and help centers
Collapsible content sections for website landing pages
Course curriculum and lesson organization in educational platforms
Product feature comparison tables with expandable details
Settings panels with grouped collapsible options
ai_summary: A versatile accordion component system built on Radix UI primitives with three visual variants (default, outline, solid) and configurable indicators (arrow, plus, none). Features smooth CSS animations for expand/collapse states, icon rotation transitions, and flexible styling via Tailwind CSS and CVA. Designed for building FAQ sections, collapsible content panels, and organized information disclosure patterns across various industry applications.
